pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 23-28 and 36: get_next_monday() function calculates next Monday; Team Standup event created with start time on next Monday at 09:00:00
setup_task.sh line 55 and setup_data.py line 143: event name set to 'Team Standup'
setup_task.sh line 44: cleanup references 'External Audit Kickoff'; verifier.py line 27: searches for events with name 'External Audit Kickoff'
task.json task description line 4: 'Move the Team Standup to Zoom Meeting'; verifier.py lines 46-48: checks if 'zoom' is in standup location
verifier.py line 71: checks if 'main conference room' is in audit location; task.json task description line 4: 'Book the Main Conference Room for this new audit meeting'

verifier.py line 88: expected_attendees set to {'Alice Johnson', 'Grace Patel', 'Karen Lee'}; setup_data.py lines 40, 46, 50: all three contacts created during environment initialization with valid email addresses

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Odoo 17 calendar events in the odoo_scheduling_env. The Team Standup meeting is scheduled for next Monday at 09:00 AM in the Main Conference Room and must be moved to Zoom Meeting. A new 1-hour External Audit Kickoff meeting must be created for the same time slot (next Monday, 9:00 AM) in the Main Conference Room with attendees Alice Johnson (Senior Financial Analyst), Grace Patel (CFO), and Karen Lee (Legal Counsel). All attendee names are valid contacts created during environment setup.
